context: Tests whether the agent uses the get_mr_comments.sh script, validates responses, filters system messages, groups by author, and properly handles the structured output format.

checklist.name: Uses get_mr_comments.sh script
checklist.description: Script calls .agents/skills/gitlab-api/scripts/get_mr_comments.sh or includes the script in the solution

checklist.name: Validates response output
checklist.description: Checks for expected fields like 'Author:' or 'Date:' in the script output before processing

checklist.name: Filters System: false
checklist.description: Explicitly filters or excludes comments where System: true to remove automated messages

checklist.name: Groups by author
checklist.description: Organizes comments by author name or username in the summary

checklist.name: Parses Author field
checklist.description: Extracts and uses the Author field from the output format

checklist.name: Parses Date field
checklist.description: Extracts and uses the Date field from the output format

checklist.name: Parses Type field
checklist.description: Extracts and uses the Type field (DiffNote or comment) from the output format

checklist.name: Parses System field
checklist.description: Extracts and uses the System field to identify automated vs human comments

checklist.name: Handles GITLAB_TOKEN
checklist.description: References, sets, or documents the need for GITLAB_TOKEN or GITLAB_PAT environment variable

checklist.name: Error handling
checklist.description: Includes error handling for invalid URLs or authentication failures
